decision_title: Use confidence tiers for record matching
context: Binary match labels did not show uncertainty.
follow_up_action: Implement High, Medium, Low, and No Match outputs.

decision_title: Delay modeling until QA threshold is met
context: Current feature validation is below target.
Content review status was inconsistently recorded.
